> `const` **MapPipe**: \<`TSource`, `TDestination`\>(`from`, `to`, `options?`) => `Type`\<`PipeTransform`\>

Defined in: [packages/nestjs/src/lib/map.pipe.ts:22](https://github.com/nartc/mapper/blob/main/packages/nestjs/src/lib/map.pipe.ts#L22)

Maps request bodies or query values with synchronous or asynchronous mappings.
Promise-returning member resolvers and callbacks are awaited, and mapping
errors propagate through Nest's request pipeline.

### TSource

`TSource` *extends* `Dictionary`\<`TSource`\>
